_README: Registry of coh:// namespaces. A fork adds its head's name to 'repos' (and optionally a 'domains' entry) and that namespace becomes mintable via make_uri / makeUri. Entries are MERGED onto the built-ins (never replace them); names must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*$. Loaded by both coherency_uri.py and src/core/coherency-uri.js. Override the path with COHERENCY_NAMESPACES, or add ephemeral entries via COHERENCY_EXTRA_REPOS / COHERENCY_EXTRA_DOMAINS.
